title: Quran, Sura 5: Al-Ma'ida
description: Sura 5 (Al-Ma'ida: The Table Spread) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 5 (Al-Ma'ida: The Table Spread) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: This day I have perfected for you your religion and completed My favor upon you and have approved for you Islam as religion.
